overall.description: A cinematic drive across an elevated highway bridge in a futuristic cyberpunk city, featuring neon-lit buildings, industrial smokestacks, and a flying vehicle passing overhead. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality rendering and warm afternoon lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a drive along an elevated highway bridge with prominent metal safety railings on the right. Industrial smokestacks and power line towers are visible in the distance against a clear blue sky. The road is completely empty with no other vehicles or pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with panoramic cyberpunk city views

events.description: bridge safety railing ends, opening up to wide view of the cyberpunk city skyline

dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
tall modern street lights lining the center of the highway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed bridge section, the scene opens into a wide panoramic view of a futuristic cyberpunk city. A prominent building with glowing pink neon kanji signage appears on the left, while the distant skyline features numerous glass and steel skyscrapers. Modern highway light poles line the center of the empty asphalt road.

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle approaching from the right side and passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera continues driving along the empty highway toward the neon-lit buildings. A flying vehicle enters the frame from the right, passing overhead and adding dynamic movement to the otherwise still scene. The cyberpunk city skyline remains prominent in the background under the clear afternoon sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a stark industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins on an empty bridge flanked by metal safety railings, with industrial smokestacks and power line towers standing against a clear blue sky. As the camera exits the enclosed bridge section, the view opens into a wide panorama of the city, revealing glass skyscrapers and a prominent building adorned with glowing pink neon kanji. The scene then pushes further into the urban landscape along the asphalt road, where modern light poles line the path toward the dense skyline. Finally, a flying vehicle sweeps into the frame from the right and passes overhead, adding a sense of dynamic motion to the futuristic afternoon vista.
